name: DiaChi2Cap
description: Ứng dụng chuyển đổi địa chỉ 2 cấp - Windows portable GUI app
displayDescription: Windows GUI tool for batch-converting Vietnamese addresses from old format to the new 2-level administrative format. Needed because Vietnam reformed its administrative structure and millions of address records need updating. Works by calling the address-converter.io.vn API in batches of 1000 with rate-limit retry. Contains CustomTkinter desktop UI with TXT/Excel file input and progress tracking. Used by government workers, logistics teams, and data administrators. Built with Python, CustomTkinter, PyInstaller for portable exe.
